title: Is Binary Divisible By Three
description: Given a non-empty string s containing only the characters '0' and '1', return True if the string represents a valid binary number that is divisible by 3, return False otherwise. For instance: Input='110', Output=True
inputFormat: A non-empty string s containing only the characters '0' and '1'
outputFormat: Boolean: True if s represents a valid binary number that is divisible by 3, otherwise False
